privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.intro: CampuStay respects your privacy. We collect only the data needed to provide roommate matching, messaging, and account functionality.
privacyPolicy.collectBody: We may store profile information you provide, account credentials, interaction preferences, and in-app activity required to deliver app features.
privacyPolicy.useBody: Your data is used to personalize match recommendations, keep your account secure, and improve app reliability and user safety.
privacyPolicy.controlsBody: You can edit profile details, adjust visibility settings, and request account deletion from inside the app.

privacySafety.title: Privacy & Safety
privacySafety.subtitle: Control who sees your profile and manage blocked accounts.
privacySafety.visibilityTitle: Show my profile in the stack
privacySafety.visibilityHelp: If turned off, your profile will not appear in other students' Home screens.
privacySafety.blockedEmpty: You have not blocked any profiles.

modals.rematchPromptTitle: Do you want to add this person back to your matches?

helpSupport.title: Help & Support
helpSupport.subtitle: Browse frequently asked questions or contact the support team directly.

faq.matchesAnswer: When you both swipe right on each other, a chat room opens in your Matches tab.
faq.socialQuestion: Is my social media visible to everyone?
faq.socialAnswer: Only your confirmed Matches can see your linked social media profiles.
faq.reportQuestion: How do I report a fake profile?
faq.reportAnswer: You can report or block a user directly from their profile card or within your chat room.

editProfile.title: Complete Your Profile
editProfile.photoFootnote: A default avatar silhouette will be used if no photo is uploaded.
editProfile.aboutPlaceholder: Tell us about yourself, your interests, and what you're looking for in a roommate.
editProfile.hasPlace: I have a house/apartment to share
editProfile.socialInfo: Social media profiles help potential roommates get to know you better. You can always update or remove these later in your profile settings.

deleteAccount.guestBody: Guest Mode cannot delete an account because there is no signed-in profile to remove.
deleteAccount.title: Are you sure you want to delete your account?
deleteAccount.warning: This action is permanent. Your profile data, quiz responses, likes, and swipes will be permanently removed. Existing chats remain visible to your conversation partners as "{{deletedLabel}}".

errors.deleteFailed: Failed to delete your account. Please try again.

apartmentDetail.descriptionRules: House rules: No smoking indoors. Quiet hours from 22:00 to 08:00. Common areas to be kept tidy. Guests welcome with prior notice. Utilities and internet are {{utilitiesText}}.

apartmentDetail.deleteListingMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this listing? This action cannot be undone.

createListing.photosHint: Choose listing photos from your gallery or camera. Tap a photo to remove it.

q1.question: What is your overall standard of cleanliness for the shared spaces?
options: Very tidy and highly organized
Average and reasonably clean
Pretty relaxed or messy

q2.question: How frequently do you plan to contribute to deep house cleaning?
options: At least once a week
Every now and then
Only when it gets absolutely necessary

q3.question: What is your golden rule for doing the dishes?
options: Wash them immediately or daily
Leave them for the next day
Wash them only when no clean ones are left

q4.question: How do you want to manage the shared utility bills?
options: Split everything strictly down the middle
Each person takes responsibility for a specific bill
Figure it out dynamically month by month

q5.question: What is your stance on smoking or vaping inside the house?
options: I smoke regularly
I only smoke outside or on the balcony
I am a strict non-smoker

q6.question: What are your expectations regarding noise levels in the apartment?
options: I need absolute quiet most of the time
I only need it quiet during late-night hours
Noise doesn't bother me at all

q7.question: What does your typical sleep schedule look like?
options: Early bird (asleep before 11 PM)
Normal student routine (asleep between 11 PM and 1 AM)
Night owl (asleep after 1 AM)

q8.question: What is your policy on having friends or guests over?
options: Guests can come over anytime without notice
Please ask or give a heads-up first
Rare visits only, I prefer privacy

q9.question: How do you feel about hosting parties or gatherings in the apartment?
options: Love them, the more the merrier
Occasional small gatherings are perfectly fine
Strictly no parties at home

q10.question: What kind of social dynamic do you want to build with your roommate?
options: I want us to become close friends and hang out together
Friendly and polite, but we keep our separate lives
Just roommates co-existing quietly

q11.question: How do you feel about sharing personal belongings like kitchenware or furniture?
options: Share everything freely
Always ask before using my things
I completely prefer not to share

q12.question: How should we organize groceries and common household items?
options: Take turns buying shared supplies
Split the grocery costs evenly
Everyone buys and consumes their own stuff

q13.question: What is your situation or preference regarding pets in the house?
options: I have a pet or definitely want to get one
I don't have one, but pets are totally fine with me
Strictly no pets allowed

q14.question: What is your preference regarding alcohol consumption inside the apartment?
options: I enjoy drinking frequently at home
I only drink occasionally on weekends
I don't drink or prefer an alcohol-free home

q15.question: How often do you plan on using the kitchen to cook your meals?
options: I cook every single day
A few times a week
Rarely, I mostly order out or eat on campus
